name: 5dim_battlefield
title: 5Dim's mod - Battlefield
author: 5Dim
description:
Defense module for 5Dim's mod
Expands your defensive capabilities with new turrets, walls and detection systems
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of gun turrets (standard, big, small and sniper variants)
- 10 tiers of laser turrets (standard, big, small and sniper variants)
- 10 tiers of tesla turrets
- 10 tiers of flamethrower turrets
- 10 tiers of walls and gates
- 10 tiers of radars
